summary: Iteration 2: Tested Stripe payment integration and macro area registration features. All 8 backend API tests passed. All frontend UI tests passed - registration with region selection works, Stripe payment button displays correctly, payment success/cancel pages render properly, and existing features (login, home, navigation) still work correctly.
seed_data_creation: No new seed data created. Used existing demo users (marco@demo.it, giulia@demo.it) and test users created during test execution.
context_for_next_testing_agent: All new features working correctly. Stripe integration uses test API key (sk_test_emergent) so actual payment won't complete but checkout session creation and status checks work. Commission calculation (5%) is correct. Macro areas endpoint returns all 20 Italian regions with provinces and GPS coordinates. Registration flow properly validates region/province selection and sets user coordinates based on selected provincia.

backend_tests_passed: test_get_macro_areas_returns_20_regions - Returns exactly 20 Italian regions with correct structure
test_macro_areas_includes_lombardia - Validates Lombardia region with Milano coordinates (45.4642, 9.1900)
test_register_with_region_and_province - Registration with Lazio/Roma sets correct coordinates (41.9028, 12.4964)
test_register_with_lombardia_milano - Registration with Lombardia/Milano sets correct coordinates
test_create_checkout_session - Creates Stripe checkout session with 5% commission calculation
test_checkout_status_initiated - Status check returns 'initiated/unpaid' for unpaid sessions
test_checkout_own_listing_fails - Correctly returns 400 error when user tries to buy own listing
test_checkout_nonexistent_listing - Correctly returns 404 for non-existent listing
frontend_tests_passed: Registration screen loads with macro area selection UI
Regione dropdown displays all 20 regions (Lombardia, Lazio, Campania, Piemonte, Veneto, etc.)
Provincia dropdown displays correct provinces after selecting Regione (tested Lombardia -> Milano)
Registration validates region/province selection before submit
User successfully registered with region data and redirected to home
Listing detail page shows 'Paga con Stripe' button with CreditCard icon
Payment success page (/payment-success) renders with CheckCircle icon, success message, and navigation buttons
Payment cancel page (/payment-cancel) renders with XCircle icon, cancel message, and home button
Login still works correctly with existing demo users
Home screen displays categories and user location
Tab navigation UI is present and visible (Home, Cerca, Chat, Profilo)
